follow_on_dependencies.title: Patient-safe stale copy remains explicit placeholder law
follow_on_dependencies.boundedSeam: par_096 publishes stable disclosure modes and recovery posture now, but later shell work can refine the final audience copy without changing the underlying contract tuple.

follow_on_dependencies.title: Workspace stale explanations can refine later
follow_on_dependencies.boundedSeam: Workspace and pharmacy surfaces already degrade deterministically here; later shell iterations may refine phrasing only.

follow_on_dependencies.title: Operations and governance diagnostic wording can refine later
follow_on_dependencies.boundedSeam: The downgrade law is published here. Later content work may refine diagnostics or handoff wording, but not the runtime posture transitions.

gap_resolutions.notes: Bounded SSE reconnect defaults for patient routes until transport tuning is validated in production.
Embedded and secure-link channels use short replay windows and fail closed on ambiguity.
Workspace routes preserve anchor context but freeze writes until projection freshness is re-established.
Hub queues and case views favor summary continuity with explicit recovery on replay gaps.
Pharmacy fan-out keeps same-shell continuity while suppressing dispatch mutation until replay completes.
Support ticket workspace reconnects may recover in place but stay explicit about masked or delegated truth.
Support replay observe routes suspend live continuity on ambiguity and require manual restore.
Governance routes fail closed to operator handoff on manifest or trust ambiguity.
Operations websocket defaults allow fast replay-safe reconnect but never imply restored freshness by transport alone.
